hero.subtitle: Waldorf Preschool
hero.desc: A preschool in a unique setting within the Järvafältet nature reserve, housed in the genuine manor environment of Säby Gård.

about.heading: Where childhood takes its time
about.p1: At our preschool we offer a calm and safe environment where every child can develop at their own pace. We work according to Waldorf pedagogy, where play, rhythm and creative expression are at the heart of everything we do. Through stories, song, movement and experiences in nature, we nurture each child's imagination, curiosity and joy of learning.
about.p2: Each day follows a clear and predictable rhythm that brings security and familiarity. We spend a great deal of time outdoors in all seasons, letting children experience the changing of the seasons up close. The materials we use are simple and natural, leaving plenty of room for imagination and free play.
about.p3: We value close collaboration with families and see every child as a unique individual.
about.adm_p1: The preschool is part of the municipal childcare plan and is run by the Säby Waldorf Preschool Foundation. We accept children between the ages of 1 and 7, and admission is handled through the municipality's and the preschool's waiting list.
about.adm_p2: You can read more and apply for a place via Järfälla municipality's page for
about.adm_link: applications for preschool and pedagogical care

reviews.heading: Warmth from our families
reviews.sub: Stories of care, growth and joy
reviews.r1_body: The preschool is situated in a nature reserve, next to a large stable, surrounded entirely by nature. The staff are wonderful — most of them attended or have had their own children at the preschool. I am truly happy and grateful that my child goes here. I wholeheartedly recommend it.
reviews.r2_body: So pleased with this preschool — wonderful staff, an incredible natural setting, and they even have their own chef serving freshly made vegetarian food. Couldn't be happier!
reviews.r3_body:
There is no better start in life. The preschool offers not only lifelong learning but also security, calm and harmony. The environments are adapted to children's development and age, creating a peaceful atmosphere that lets creativity flourish.

The teachers are warm, fair and professional. The child is always at the centre. Safety is everything — no unknown substitute teachers and small group sizes.

Toxin-free preschool. Vegetarian and organic food. Their own chef cooking world-class meals.

I am constantly amazed by how much my child is learning. Säby Waldorf Preschool gives children a broad foundation — fine and gross motor skills, language, mathematics, natural sciences and much more.

recipes.heading: From the kitchen at Säby
recipes.body: Every week we cook from scratch — organic, vegetarian and made with love. Bring a little of the Säby feeling into your own kitchen.

contact.heading: You are welcome to visit us
contact.body: Get in touch and we'll tell you more. We are available between 08.00–14.00.

map.heading: Find us
map.body: Säby Waldorf Preschool is located at Säby Gård, by Lake Säbysjön in the nature reserve, in the beautiful surroundings of Järvafältet, just 1 km from Jakobsberg town centre.

features.f1_p: We are based at Säby Gård in the heart of the Järvafältet nature reserve — one of Stockholm's most beautiful. Children are outdoors every day regardless of weather, experiencing the seasons up close.
features.f2_p: Our own chef prepares vegetarian, organic food every day — no processed ingredients or ready-made meals. Children eat wholesome home cooking made with care and quality produce.
features.f3_p: We work with a clear daily rhythm, handcraft, song, storytelling and creative play. Children learn by doing — with their hands, bodies and imagination working together.
features.f4_p: For our youngest children groups are capped at 8, for older children at 12. Fewer children means more time, more presence and a calmer daily life — for children and families alike.
